enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua.title: Enable Automatic Tagging and Save PDF/UA
enable-auto-tagging-pdf-ua.description: Demonstrates how to enable Aspose.Pdf's automatic tagging for PDF/UA compliance, set document language and title, and save the result as a tagged PDF.

create-pdf-tagged-heading-language.title: Create PDF with Tagged Heading and Language Attribute
create-pdf-tagged-heading-language.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, enable tagged content, add a level‑1 heading element, and assign a language attribute for accessibility.

set-pdf-document-title-root-structure.title: Set PDF Document Title in Root Structure Element
set-pdf-document-title-root-structure.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and sets the document title on the root structure element while also updating the standard PDF Info title metadata.

create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
create-tagged-pdf-with-toc.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with logical structure, set accessibility properties, and add a visible Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API.

add-paragraph-to-toci-tagged-pdf.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in Tagged PDF
add-paragraph-to-toci-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element, add a paragraph with ActualText for accessibility, and attach it to the PDF's tagged structure using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-tagged-paragraph-pdf.title: Create PDF with a Custom Tagged Paragraph
custom-tagged-paragraph-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a tagged PDF and assign a custom tag name to a paragraph element using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
add-external-link-with-title-to-tagged-p.description: Shows how to insert a LinkElement with a title attribute into a tagged PDF and associate it with an external URL using Aspose.Pdf.

create-internal-page-link-tagged-pdf.title: Create Internal Page Link with Tagged PDF Role /Link
create-internal-page-link-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that jumps to another page and associate it with a Tagged PDF Link element (role /Link) for accessibility.

add-note-element-to-paragraph.title: Add a Note Element to a Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
add-note-element-to-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to create a paragraph in a tagged PDF, add a supplemental note element as its child, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-caption-note-to-figure-tagged-pdf.title: Add Caption Note to a Figure in a Tagged PDF
add-caption-note-to-figure-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element, bind it to an image, and append a Note element as a caption in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-actualtext-to-images.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
add-actualtext-to-images.description: Demonstrates how to add an ActualText attribute to image elements in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API, enabling screen readers to read a description of each image.

set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.title: Set ActualText for Pronunciation in a Tagged PDF Span
set-actualtext-pronunciation-span.description: Demonstrates how to create a span element in a tagged PDF, assign visible text, and provide hidden pronunciation text using the ActualText property, then save the document.

update-paragraph-language-to-french.title: Update Language of a Tagged Paragraph to French
update-paragraph-language-to-french.description: Shows how to locate a ParagraphElement in a tagged PDF, set its language to French (fr-FR), and optionally convert the document to PDF/UA compliance before saving.

set-document-language-tagged-pdf.title: Set Document Language for Tagged PDF
set-document-language-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf-element.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
propagate-language-to-tagged-pdf-element.description: Demonstrates how to set a language attribute on a PDF's root tagged element and recursively apply it to all child structure elements using Aspose.Pdf.

add-tagged-table-to-pdf.title: Add Tagged Table to PDF
add-tagged-table-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's Tagged Content API to create a structure‑tree table with 3 rows and 4 columns, set cell text, and save the PDF as a tagged document.

create-merged-table-header-th-actualtext.title: Create Merged Table Header with TH Role and ActualText
create-merged-table-header-th-actualtext.description: Demonstrates building a tagged PDF table, merging a header cell across columns, assigning the TH role, and setting ActualText for accessibility.

style-table-cells-accessibility.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
style-table-cells-accessibility.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table and apply individual background colors, border thickness, and padding to each cell for better visual accessibility using Aspose.PDF.

apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
apply-custom-row-borders-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to set different border styles for table rows in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, alternating thick red borders for even rows and thin blue borders for odd rows.

add-custom-tags-to-pdf-table-cells.title: Add Custom Data-Type Tags to PDF Table Cells and Validate PDF/A Compliance
add-custom-tags-to-pdf-table-cells.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a tagged logical structure with a table, assigns custom data‑type tags to each cell, saves the PDF, and validates it for PDF/A‑1B compliance.

nested-table-inside-paragraph.title: Nested Table Inside Paragraph in Tagged PDF
nested-table-inside-paragraph.description: Loads a PDF, enables tagged content, adds a paragraph that contains an outer table with an inner nested table, and walks the logical structure to validate the hierarchy.

create-bullet-numbered-lists-tagged-pdf.title: Create Bullet and Numbered Lists in a Tagged PDF
create-bullet-numbered-lists-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing both unordered (bullet) and ordered (numbered) lists using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API to produce accessible documents.

create-form-field-and-associate-tagged-f.title: Create a Form Field and Associate a Tagged /Form Element
create-form-field-and-associate-tagged-f.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBox form field to a PDF's AcroForm, create a corresponding /Form structure element, and link the two for accessibility tagging.

add-textbox-form-field-with-placeholder.title: Add Text Box Form Field with Placeholder and Tag as Form Element
add-textbox-form-field-with-placeholder.description: Demonstrates how to insert a TextBox form field with placeholder text into an existing PDF and tag it as a /Form element for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf's tagging API.

add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
add-page-break-to-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a PageBreak element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enabling proper section separation for accessibility.

update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
update-paragraph-actualtext-in-tagged-pd.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a paragraph by its ActualText using the tagged content API, and replace it with corrected text, then save the updated document.

replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.title: Replace Existing Note Element in Tagged PDF
replace-note-element-in-tagged-pdf.description: Shows how to find and remove existing NoteElement objects in a tagged PDF and add a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf.

iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements
iterate-tagged-pdf-structure-elements.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged logical structure, and recursively walks through each StructureElement, logging the element's title, language, and any custom tag.

set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF
set-paragraph-title-in-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set the Title property of a paragraph element in a tagged PDF and add it to the document's logical structure using Aspose.Pdf.

add-figure-title-and-alt-text-to-tagged-.title: Add Figure Title and Alt Text to Tagged PDF
add-figure-title-and-alt-text-to-tagged-.description: Demonstrates how to create a figure element in a tagged PDF, set its Title and AlternativeText for accessibility, and attach it to the document's structure tree.

validate-pdf-ua-compliance.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
validate-pdf-ua-compliance.description: Shows how to validate a tagged PDF against the PDF/UA standard using Aspose.Pdf and produce an XML compliance report.

check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
check-pdf-ua-compliance-and-log-result.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, checking its PDF/UA accessibility compliance via the IsPdfUaCompliant property, and writing the boolean outcome to a log file.

parse-xml-validation-report-summary.title: Parse XML Validation Report for Error and Violation Summary
parse-xml-validation-report-summary.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, extract <ErrorCode> and <Violation> elements, and produce frequency summaries using LINQ.

filter-xml-errors-missing-alt-text.title: Filter XML Errors for Missing Alt Text and List Image IDs
filter-xml-errors-missing-alt-text.description: Shows how to load an XML validation report, filter errors that mention missing Alt text, and extract a distinct list of image IDs using LINQ to XML.

extract-text-from-tagged-pdf.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF via Structure Tree
extract-text-from-tagged-pdf.description: The example opens a PDF, accesses its tagged content, recursively walks the logical structure tree, and collects the ActualText of each structure element to output the extracted text.

export-structure-tree-to-xml-report.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate HTML Report via XSLT
export-structure-tree-to-xml-report.description: Demonstrates how to extract a PDF's tagged structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform it with XSLT to produce an HTML report.

export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
export-pdf-structure-tree-to-json.description: Loads a tagged PDF, traverses its logical structure tree, and serializes the hierarchy (type, actual text, alternative text) into a formatted JSON file for accessibility analysis.

extract-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.title: Extract Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
extract-tagged-pdf-structure-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, reads its tagged (accessibility) logical structure, builds a hierarchical POCO representation, and writes the hierarchy to a formatted JSON file.

extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
extract-notes-from-tagged-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to traverse the structure tree of a tagged PDF, locate all NoteElement objects, concatenate their actual text, and save the result to a plain‑text file.

extract-pdf-links-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
extract-pdf-links-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, find link annotations, extract their target URLs, and write the page number and URL pairs to a CSV file.

batch-auto-tag-pdfs.title: Batch Auto‑Tag PDFs and Save with Suffix
batch-auto-tag-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to add missing accessibility tags, and save each document with a "_tagged" suffix.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfa1b.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDF/A-1B with Auto‑Tagging
batch-convert-pdfs-to-tagged-pdfa1b.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, enables Aspose.Pdf's auto‑tagging engine, converts the document to PDF/A‑1B (a tagged PDF), and saves the result to a separate output folder.

batch-validate-pdfs-xml-logs-summary-csv.title: Batch Validate PDFs and Generate XML Logs with Summary CSV
batch-validate-pdfs-xml-logs-summary-csv.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a folder, validates each against PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, writes an XML validation log for each file, and creates a summary CSV indicating compliance status.

batch-pdfa1b-validation-xml-dashboard.title: Batch PDF/A-1B Validation with XML Logs and CSV Dashboard
batch-pdfa1b-validation-xml-dashboard.description: The example processes all PDF files in a folder, validates each against PDF/A‑1B using Aspose.Pdf, stores the XML validation log, and creates a CSV dashboard summarizing compliance per file.

set-default-language-for-tagged-pdf-elem.title: Set Default Language for All Tagged PDF Elements
set-default-language-for-tagged-pdf-elem.description: Loads a PDF, ensures its tagged content has a language attribute, and recursively assigns a default language to any structure elements that lack one.
